(fn [state action]
  (case action
    :inc (update state :count inc)
    :dec (update state :count dec)
    :reset (assoc state :count 0)
    state))

(fn [state action]
  (case action
    :inc (update state :count inc)
    :dec (update state :count dec)
    :reset (assoc state :count 0)
    state))

(fn [state action]
  (case action
    :inc (update state :count inc)
    :dec (update state :count dec)
    :reset (assoc state :count 0)
    state))

(fn [state action]

(fn [state action]
  (let [color (:light state)
        next-color (case color
                     :red :green
                     :green :yellow
                     :yellow :red
                     color)]
    {:light next-color}))

(fn fizzbuzz [n]
  (let [div3 (zero? (rem n 3))
        div5 (zero? (rem n 5))]
    (condp = [div3 div5]
      [true true] "FizzBuzz"
      [true false] "Fizz"
      [false true] "Buzz"
      (str n))))
(fn [a b] (if (zero? b) a (recur b (mod a b))))
(fn [a b] (if (zero? b) a (recur b (mod a b))))
(fn [a b] (if (zero? b) a (recur b (mod a b))))
(fn [a b] (if (zero? b) a (recur b (mod a b))))
